# HairGPT backend — pinned Python dependencies.
#
# Two ways to install on a new machine (do NOT mix them):
#   1. With uv (faster, canonical):     uv sync                (uses pyproject.toml + uv.lock)
#   2. With pip (universal fallback):   pip install -r requirements.txt
#
# This file is regenerated from uv.lock — do not edit by hand. To refresh:
#   uv export --format requirements-txt --no-hashes --no-emit-project --output-file requirements.txt
#
# Source of truth for what we depend on (loose constraints): pyproject.toml
# Source of truth for exact versions: uv.lock (mirrored here for pip users)
